products.name: 18650 Battery Assembly Kit
products.tagline: Everything to build a quality 18650 pack
products.short_description: Complete 18650 Li-Ion battery pack assembly kit for EV workshops and hobbyists.
products.description: NexEV's 18650 Battery Assembly Kit contains every component you need to build a quality lithium-ion battery pack. Workshop-grade materials, sourced for consistency — no piecemeal purchasing. Suitable for e-bike builds, power tool packs, solar storage, and EV conversions.
contents: 14 AWG silicone wire — red and black
PVC heat shrink tube — blue, 170mm flat width
Amass XT60H connectors — male + female pair

specs.Use case: E-bike, power tools, solar, EV conversion

shipping.fulfillment: Ships within 2 business days from Bengaluru, Karnataka

meta.title: 18650 Battery Assembly Kit | NexEV | EV Workshop Supply
meta.description: Complete 18650 Li-Ion battery pack assembly kit — nickel strips, 14 AWG wire, XT60H connectors, Kapton tape, heat shrink, insulation. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: Nickel Strip — 1 Metre Roll
products.short_description: High-purity nickel strip for cell-to-cell spot welding. Correct width and thickness for 18650 series/parallel connections.
products.description: Pure nickel strip for battery pack assembly. Correct formulation for low-resistance, high-current cell interconnects. Compatible with standard spot welders used in 18650 pack building.

meta.title: Nickel Strip 1M — Battery Pack Spot Welding | NexEV
meta.description: High-purity 8mm nickel strip for 18650 battery pack spot welding. 1 metre roll. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: 14 AWG Silicone Wire — 1m Pair
products.short_description: Flexible silicone-jacketed 14 AWG wire — rated for battery pack current, heat-resistant. Red + black, 1m each.
products.description: High-strand-count flexible silicone wire for battery pack lead wires and interconnects. Silicone jacket resists heat, cold, and flex fatigue — far superior to PVC for battery applications.

meta.title: 14 AWG Silicone Wire 1m Pair — Battery Pack | NexEV
meta.description: Flexible 14 AWG silicone wire, red and black, 1m each. Heat-resistant. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: PVC Heat Shrink Tube — 170mm
products.tagline: Blue PVC, battery pack wrap, 1 metre
products.short_description: Blue PVC heat shrink tube, 170mm flat width. Wraps a completed 18650 battery pack for insulation and clean finish.
products.description: Large-diameter PVC heat shrink tubing for wrapping completed battery packs. 170mm flat width. Shrinks evenly with a heat gun at ~80°C.

meta.title: PVC Heat Shrink 170mm — Battery Pack Wrap | NexEV
meta.description: Blue PVC heat shrink tube 170mm flat width, 1 metre. For 18650 battery pack finishing. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: Kapton Tape — 25mm / 200m Roll
products.short_description: High-temperature Kapton polyimide tape, 25mm width, 200m roll. Cell insulation, tab coverage, thermal protection.
products.description: Genuine polyimide tape for battery pack insulation. Used on positive cell terminals, between cell groups, and anywhere electrical isolation is needed near heat.

meta.title: Kapton Polyimide Tape 25mm 200m — Battery Pack | NexEV
meta.description: High-temperature Kapton tape, 25mm wide, 200m roll. For 18650 battery pack cell insulation. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: 18650 Insulation Rings — 100 Pack
products.short_description: 18650 cell-end insulation rings. Prevents short circuits at weld points. 100 per pack.
products.description: Mika/barley paper insulation rings for 18650 cells. Placed on the positive terminal before spot welding to prevent shorts between the nickel strip and the cell casing.

meta.title: 18650 Insulation Rings 100 Pack — Battery Assembly | NexEV
meta.description: Mika insulation rings for 18650 positive terminals. 100 per pack. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: Insulation Paper Roll
products.short_description: Insulation paper roll for between-cell group separation. Prevents shorts between parallel groups. 10m roll.
products.description: Electrical insulation paper for use between cell groups and between the pack and casing. Flexible, tearable to size. 10m per roll.

meta.title: Insulation Paper Roll — Battery Pack Assembly | NexEV
meta.description: Electrical insulation paper for 18650 battery pack. 10m roll. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: Amass XT60H Connectors — Pair
products.short_description: Genuine Amass XT60H male + female connector pair. Gold-plated, 60A rated. Standard for e-bike battery packs.
products.description: Genuine Amass XT60H connectors — upgraded XT60 with housing tabs. Gold-plated bullet contacts for low resistance. Industry standard for battery pack discharge leads.

meta.title: Amass XT60H Connector Pair — Battery Pack | NexEV
meta.description: Genuine Amass XT60H gold-plated connector pair (male + female). 60A rated. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: 80650 Battery Holders — 10 Pack
products.tagline: Plastic cell holders for spot-weld alignment
products.short_description: Plastic 80650 holders for 18650 cells. Keeps cells aligned during spot welding. 10 per pack.
products.description: Rigid plastic cell holders sized for 18650 cells. Keeps cells in precise series/parallel alignment during spot welding. 10 per pack.

meta.title: 80650 Battery Holders 10 Pack — 18650 Cell Alignment | NexEV
meta.description: Plastic 80650 holders for 18650 cells. 10 per pack. Ships from Karnataka.

products.name: 10S BMS — 36V Battery Pack
products.short_description: 10S BMS for 36V lithium-ion battery packs. Sourcing in progress. Register interest for priority access.
products.description: NexEV is sourcing a reliable 10S BMS for 36V battery packs. Target: 30A continuous, cell balancing, over-charge, over-discharge, over-current, and short-circuit protection. BIS IS 16893 compliance pathway in progress.

meta.title: 10S BMS 36V — Coming Soon | NexEV
